Print Sheet: Contacts: Rev. Ronald Anton, S.J. (Religious Researcher), Maria Calderon, (LA Central Library)
Haven - Basment in of a resturant on Olvira Street. [La Golondrina Mexican Cafe] (Security, Location)
Strength - (Disarm, Grapple, Knock Down, or Pierce the Heart)
Nosferatu Loremaster, you are seeking to hide and protect Kindred lore in the failure of ShrekNET and the rise of the Second Inquisition.
You know the status of everyone in your sect. Leadership will tell you how they got one of them. Alternative Idenity can let you earn and fake status. Maxium 5 Fleeting w/o merits.
Knowing a lot about all the things and then telling stories about it.

Unseeing Eye (1 point merit)
You cannot be targeted by supernatural powers that track or identify you at range, unless LOS.

Hidden Advantage (2 point merit)
Individuals using Auspex do not automatically realize there is an Obfuscated person nearby when they are near you. UP works when asleep or Torpor.

Gehenna Prophet (2 point flaw)
If you run out of Willpower, you fall into torpor.

Curiosity (2 point flaw)
If you fail to explore the unknown, your max WP -1. This penalty is cumulative.

Cursed (1 point flaw)
I can only write in symbols not the words of the language I can read. These symbols can not be read by anyone but me, but I can't write notes to people
OOO Healthy (No Effects) OOO Injured (Can be Targeted) OOO Incapacitated (No Simple Actions)  / 3 Steps Every Simple &/Or Complex

rows: Nosferatu Loremaster, you are seeking to hide and protect Kindred lore in the failure of ShrekNET and the rise of the Second Inquisition.

Born in Mexico and educated by Jesuits, your family hoped you'd go into the church or university. Far too curious for that, you because something of a cultural anthropologist, a century before that term even would come into use. You were far more interested in studying people, cultures and folktales. You took up traveling the wild and rought northern reaches of Mexico, up into modern day New Mexico, Arizona and California. What you found there was far more interesting, and dangerous, than you ever dreamed. All the adventures you had and stories you could tell! Men who changed to beasts, strange elemental creatures, and stranger stories still. You were curious about it all, and it got you in trouble from time-to-time - like the moment you angered an old witch and she cursed you. She thought you were stealing her words in your notebook, and you haven't been able to write in anything but symbols since. Thankfully for you, you had a good memory and an ear for a great story. Your research became one part information gathering, one part storytelling. It was this that drew a different kind of monster out from the Arizona desert, a Nosferatu who embraced you for your quick mind and pretty stories. You took on his version of the clan flaw, turning into a hideous, dried out, mummified husk of a creature, twisted and leathery and gnarled as old oak. You became so think, the local Navajo near Taklishim's residents took to calling you Nakai Tsosi, the "thin Spaniard", and it's an alias that has come in handy.

Taklishim, the Old Man, existed there for a long time before you came along, and had a network of childer spread across northern Mexico and what would become the southwest US. Autarkis himself, his childer have spread through Sabbat and Camarilla cities alike. You've travelled them all, and have survived Sabbat incursions, the Anarch Free State, and the purging of the Niktuku. Along the way, you have gathered the stories, the knowledge and the memories of all the warrens you've passed through. You are a walking database of them, frankly, which is what your sire desired. Computers are fine and all, but frankly, you never trusted a machine to remember the way you do. Anyone can get into one of those. And you really can't trust a network made by a Tremere anyway, you thought it was foolish to rely on that alone. It's a good thing, too. Someone has been in the network. You've heard the whispers of it from the others. Your clans secrets are out and no one knows who did it or how. Some have suggested some of the culprits have deep ties in California. It makes sense, considering the rise of technology out here. 

Besides, you've heard rumors and seen...things. At first, you thought it was just a side effect of the stories coallescing in your brain, all the legends and half-truths, but they've been getting worse and worse, visions of things coming. Something serious is coming down the pike, and you want to know what it is as much as it also terrifies you. The world is going to go to hell in a handbasket and you may be the only one who holds the memory of how to fight what's coming, when it does.
Your relationship to these people is described. This may mean they do not know you.
Follow your leads regarding the hacking of ShrekNET and who might be involved and just what do they know.
Taklishm sent you hear to reconnect with the disparite Nosferatu who remain here after the purge and bring the warrens together for safety in these dark nights.

You don't know if you brain is just overloaded with information or what (who knows what that curse did to you). You've had these weird visions ever since. Maybe someone else understands what is going on.

rows: Is following both the Prince and the Seneschal and has sent mice to find their havens and track them. Is also actively tracking the Setite, Miles Lords (in game action) via the same means. Knows that Tara is stockpiling weapons in San Bernardino and is the most active threat to the Camarilla.

1 Action concealing Nos Embracees (concealing). Also found the identity of a hunter based out of St. Sofia's, Petros Ballas, who leads a group there. (One group in Hollywood Forever Cemetary, one in warren in downtown. Embraced outside of the city and brought in.

2 Actions defending Nos Embracees. Looking up Petros Ballas, who has a wife, kids and extended family and is looking to enter the priesthood for the Greek Orthodox church. Reaches out to archons to see if can serve as a servire. Creating identity to try and attract recruitment by the 2nd Inquisition - long play there.

Moved his brood into these following cities:

The 10 keep with me will be put in the unused parts of Union Station. 

the cities I will have the vampires go to 

Phoenix
San Antonio
San Diego 
Dallas
Austin
San Fran
Fort Worth
Seattle 
Portland
Denver
El Paso
Las Vagas
Albuquerue
Tucson
Frenso
Sacromento
Mesa
Long Beach
OC
Colorodo Springs
Oakland
Honolulu
Corpus Christi

Concealing the Nosferantu Embraces that are in the other 2 warrens. Feeding them information on how to hide, hunt and the basics of camarilla law. All explaining how this information is very sensitive.  I have already spent 1 action concealing this, so now this is 2 extra defense.

Now that I know the identity of a Inquisitioner, I am going start learning information to blackmail or compel him. Like anything laws he has broken or people who he would betray the Inquisition for like family members.
Send letters to the archons who attended last court, offering to give information about los angeles exchange for a servese title.

Influnce Underworld 1 Homeless "Word on the Street" trying to track anyone who is tracking vampires actions. (NPC's or PC's its just a fishing expedition for plot)

Retainers 1 - Molly have her drive around with dummies in the car of me, looking like I am outside during the day. 
Computers - Get a cheap amazon temperature ear tester, by rerouting someone who is buying one on amazon.

Ability - Computer/science/et cetera that this is giving me a downtime.
Using computer to prep and build the new warrens when i get the ventrue money.
Influnce underworld conseal - Retainer tracking down new ventrue prim's house.
